word: # Dictionary patch layer. One word per line. Columns: word, action (allow or
# deny), band (common for allow seeds; blank for deny), note (optional).
# Allow = accept a word the base list misses, banded so it classifies right.
# Deny = reject a word the base list wrongly accepts (seeded empty for now).
# Bea flags a word, it becomes one line here, and the dictionary tunes to her.
# Allowlist: modern words ENABLE rejects, from the must-accept probe in
# scripts/_investigate, plus udon. All common, because they are common words.
# Denylist (Phase 1): SCOWL size-95 proper-noun and foreign warts that
# are formable from the source pool. Generated by scan, not hand-flagged.
# Real words and inflections (betcha, yeps) are deliberately kept valid.
